Stub function for returning a fixed Bluetooth stack ID.

# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file that defines a function [`bt_stack_id`](<#bt_stack_id>). The function returns an unsigned integer with a constant value of `1`. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
